markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the ideal EM profile for Strategy Sprints to guide recruiting.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual-Threat Profile:** The ideal EM combines deep SEO/AI strategy with strong client-facing skills. The latter is paramount for building trust and acting as a "conversion engine" for post-sprint retention.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**Urgent Hiring Goal:** Hire 3 EMs for Strategy Sprints ASAP. This will create a team of 4 (Ada + 3 hires), enabling William to transition from frontline work to a management role.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [**Sourcing Strategy:** Target Account Managers from top SEO agencies (e.g., Single Grain). These candidates often have the required blend of strategic knowledge and commercial experience.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [**Revised Interview Process:** The new process adds George to assess commercial mindset and Ella to the panel to ensure candidates can connect their work to business outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Topics

### The Ideal EM Profile

  - [**Strategic Foundation:** Deep SEO/AI knowledge is non-negotiable.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [**Why:** EMs must independently build and troubleshoot content strategies using tools like SEMrush and Claude, positioning GrowthX as a strategic partner, not just a blog creator.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**Commercial Acumen:** The sprint is a sales process; EMs must be revenue-minded.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Why:** They must build rapport, articulate value, and identify retention risks to convert clients to long-term pod engagements.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Signal:** Look for experience in quota-carrying or retention-based roles.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [**"Human X-Factor":** Strong communication and charisma are more critical than deep technical knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [**Why:** It's easier to train strategy than to teach someone how to build client trust and excitement.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Sourcing Signals:** Active self-development (e.g., AROPS certifications, Pavilion courses) indicates a candidate's passion and fit.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Sprint vs. Pod EM Roles

  - [**Strategy Sprint EM:** A "house builder" role.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Focus:** Scrappy, fast-paced, and strategic.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Why:** Requires building a complete content strategy from scratch under tight timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**Pod EM:** A "house maintainer" role.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Focus:** Long-term relationship building and value creation.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Why:** Requires refreshing existing strategies and maintaining intellectual curiosity over a multi-year client relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [**Decision:** The profiles are similar enough to source from the same candidate pool, with interview questions tailored to each role's nuances.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Hiring Plan & Urgency

  - [**Goal:** Hire 3 EMs for Strategy Sprints ASAP.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This creates a stable team of 4 (Ada + 3 hires), enabling William to transition to a management role.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [**Interim State:** William, George, and Cathy are currently acting as EMs.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [**Assumption:** George and Cathy will be redeployed once new hires are ramped.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [**Internal Sourcing:** No viable internal candidates were identified.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [**Why:** The production team lacks the required commercial and client-facing experience.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Interview Process Updates

  - [**New Flow:**](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
    1.  [**Recruiter Screen:** Marília](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
    2.  [**Hiring Manager Interview:** William (tests strategic depth)](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
    3.  [**Commercial Acumen Interview:** George (tests client-facing skills)](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
    4.  [**Panel Interview:** Ella & Bridget (tests connecting work to business outcomes)](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [**Take-Home Assignment:** The current assignment is outdated and requires revision.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marília:**](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
      - [Source candidates from top SEO agencies (e.g., Single Grain).](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [Schedule interviews with Ashley and Steph to calibrate the profile.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [Share a list of target SEO agencies and a sample candidate profile.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [Revise the take-home assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [**Ella & Bridget:**](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
      - [Collaborate to finalize the new take-home assignment today.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**All Interviewers:**](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [Confirm interview questions and rubrics for the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/PcRvTCNyLahYkiR3ntXyPCTe2h4KYEmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
